message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate more modules to builder inline block APIs

- token_mod.zig: genIsterminal, genIsnonterminal, genIseof
- fnmatch_mod.zig: genFnmatch, genFilter, genTranslate
- heapq_mod.zig: all 7 functions
- random_mod.zig: genRandom, genUniform, genGauss, genExpovariate, genRandbits
